prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业含计算机科学与技术、临床医学、通信工程等 ，相关专业大类（计算机类、电子信息/通信、临床医学）在2026年社会热度仍偏热/推荐；江西省2026年普通高考总人数约474900人，按近年物理类占比约56.4%估算约267844人 ，较2025年物理类266425人略有增加，考生规模小幅上升对竞争有微弱加剧作用。；西藏大学位于西藏拉萨，距江西省较远，地域 偏好对江西考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用；该校在江西省招生人数较少（2025年物理类15人），属跨省小规模招生，位次波动易受个别考生填报行为影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年计划小幅缩招（竞争略缓解）、江西省考生规模微增（竞争略加剧）以及学校层次偏弱、无强势学科拉动等因素，考虑考生规模微增带来的竞争压力，预测最低位次约56049名，较2025年60705名前移约4656名（竞争略加剧），区间55549–56549名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024, the minimum ranking was approximately 29,367, and in 2025 it significantly shifted back to about 60,705, a backward shift of about 31,338 in one year, reflecting a marked decline in application popularity and a substantial lowering of admission thresholds in 2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 60,705; the 2024 physics category planned for 2 students, but in 2025 it greatly expanded to 15 students, and in 2026 it plans for 13 students, a reduction of 2 students (-13.3%) compared to 2025. The reduction means a slight easing of competition, which has a downward effect on rankings. 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 195th (2025), not entering the top 200 in 2026, overall ranking is relatively low among 211 universities, with limited appeal to high-scoring candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tibet University has no obvious negative signals in reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity, or abnormal application files; Douyin popularity ranks 30th (relatively hot), overall attention is average, with no signs of application panic or cold surprises; Tibet University has no A- or above level disciplines in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, overall discipline strength is weak among 211 universities, lacking the pull effect of flagship majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Physics category enrollment majors include Computer Science and Technology, Clinical Medicine, Communication Engineering, etc.; related major categories (Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Clinical Medicine) remain relatively hot/recommended in 2026 social popularity; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province general college entrance examination is about 474,900, estimated at about 267,844 based on the recent physics category proportion of about 56.4%, a slight increase from the 2025 physics category of 266,425, with a small increase in candidate scale slightly intensifying competition. Tibet University is located in Lhasa, Tibet, far from Jiangxi Province, and regional preference has a certain inhibitory effect on Jiangxi candidates' willingness to apply; the university enrolls a small number of students in Jiangxi Province (15 in physics category in 2025), belonging to cross-provincial small-scale enrollment, and ranking fluctuations are easily affected by individual candidate application behavior.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the slight reduction in 2026 enrollment plan (slightly easing competition), the slight increase in Jiangxi candidate scale (slightly intensifying competition), and the weak school level with no strong disciplines to pull, taking into account the competitive pressure from the slight increase in candidate scale, the predicted minimum ranking is about 56,049, a forward shift of about 4,656 from the 2025 ranking of 60,705 (slightly intensifying competition), with a range of 55,549–56,549.
